title: BoardGameGeek Hotness
content:
1. **Concordia: Special Edition**
*2027*
Merchants build and trade throughout the Roman Empire to please the Gods.
![Concordia: Special Edition](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_05a34608.jpg)

2. **Concordia**
*2013*
Merchants build and trade throughout the Roman Empire to please the Gods.
![Concordia](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_220a9ee2.jpg)

3. **Rattlesnake**
*2026*
Be the last player standing in a Wild West shootout.
![Rattlesnake](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_c5cd1825.jpg)

4. **Altera**
*2027*
Rival factions settle their differences in a grand festival.
![Altera](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_7da12e8c.png)

5. **World Order**
*2026*
Simulate the modern global political system in this area-majority game.
![World Order](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_eca9a994.jpg)

6. **Container**
*2026*
Set prices as you produce, sell, and ship containers in a tight economic simulation.
![Container](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_2a4fda51.jpg)

7. **8 Dragons**
*2027*
Fly across the kingdoms, gather treasures, and form a legendary dragon swarm.
![8 Dragons](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_cb9c47d8.jpg)

8. **Wondrous Creatures**
*2024*
Build the best reserve in the world for 100+ fantastic creatures!
![Wondrous Creatures](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_1daf08d2.jpg)

9. **Harmonies**
*2024*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_b62fdb6d.jpg)

10. **The Old King's Crown**
*2025*
Out-manoeuvre your rivals as you vie for control of an ancient, crumbling kingdom.
![The Old King's Crown](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_27f35193.jpg)

11. **The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship**
*2025*
As members of The Fellowship, embark on a journey to save—or doom—Middle-earth.
![The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_def04d1b.png)

12. **Harmonies: Pulse**
*2026*
A small expansion for Harmonies that makes descision making even more challenging.
![Harmonies: Pulse](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_63949be2.png)

13. **Moon Colony Bloodbath**
*2025*
Whatever can go wrong will go wrong. Players compete to keep their colonists alive.
![Moon Colony Bloodbath](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_018338b3.jpg)

14. **Deep Regrets**
*2025*
A game about fishing progressively more horrifying things out of the ocean.
![Deep Regrets](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_3a96aa3f.jpg)

15. **Eternal Decks**
*2025*
Can you solve each stage before your deck runs out?
![Eternal Decks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_7996283d.png)

16. **Harmonies: Crescendo**
*2026*
Sanctuaries with new personal personal game boards and whisper creatures.
![Harmonies: Crescendo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_dda41beb.jpg)

17. **Entropy**
*2026*
Create stars, form planets, and guide life from microbes to animals.
![Entropy](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_9eb125a9.jpg)

18. **Lands of Evershade**
*2026*
 Hybrid RPG/board game combines storytelling, tactical combat, and dice-based system.
![Lands of Evershade](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_c1039c4b.png)

19. **Medico**
*2026*
Medieval traveling barbers on their way to becoming a famous medicus.
![Medico](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_f2fcc143.jpg)

20. **Cubaneo**
*2026*
In pre-revolution Cuba, produce and ship goods, and influence the Parliament to help.
![Cubaneo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_5596e5fa.jpg)

21. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*2024*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_dd900f27.jpg)

22. **dnup**
*2025*
Flip cards to get the right numbers and ditch your cards.
![dnup](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_2aadbcba.jpg)

23. **Ark Nova**
*2021*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_2c8fd15e.jpg)

24. **Excalibur**
*2026*
Compete, connive, and outwit your rivals to claim Excalibur as your own.
![Excalibur](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_a8112714.jpg)

25. **Dune: Imperium – Uprising**
*2023*
Deploy agents, build your deck, and engage in strategic battles to control Arrakis.
![Dune: Imperium – Uprising](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_7323a02a.jpg)
author: boardgamegeek.com

title: BoardGameGeek Bestsellers (Fallback to Plays)
content:
1. **Flip 7**
*17 months on the list*
Score the cards in front of you, or take another card, risking everything you hold?
![Flip 7](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_27ba2978.jpg)

2. **Harmonies**
*25 months on the list*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_6c1d90c7.jpg)

3. **Ark Nova**
*53 months on the list*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_f6186cc3.jpg)

4. **Castle Combo**
*20 months on the list*
Combine medieval villagers and castle dwellers to score points.
![Castle Combo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_ec1930a3.jpg)

5. **Wingspan**
*89 months on the list*
Attract a beautiful and diverse collection of birds to your wildlife preserve.
![Wingspan](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_073f3dfa.jpg)

6. **Azul**
*103 months on the list*
Artfully embellish the walls of your palace by drafting the most beautiful tiles.
![Azul](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_283986a0.png)

7. **Bomb Busters**
*13 months on the list*
Players defuse bombs by deducing and cutting unseen wires of different values.
![Bomb Busters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_b28ff2dd.png)

8. **Terraforming Mars**
*116 months on the list*
Compete with rival CEOs to make Mars habitable and build your corporate empire.
![Terraforming Mars](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_8c63e180.jpg)

9. **Sea Salt & Paper**
*35 months on the list*
A few delicate Origami-style illustrations and a whole marine universe comes to life!
![Sea Salt & Paper](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_73e6e4d9.jpg)

10. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*42 months on the list*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_c28ae4dd.jpg)

11. **Cascadia**
*58 months on the list*
Create the most harmonious ecosystem as you puzzle together habitats and wildlife.
![Cascadia](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_c1651120.jpg)

12. **Forest Shuffle**
*32 months on the list*
Curate a diverse ecology with strategic flora and fauna, winter is coming!
![Forest Shuffle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_c4646312.jpg)

13. **Hot Streak**
*4 months on the list*
Which mascot will cross the finish line first? Who will be DQ'd?
![Hot Streak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_14c269a2.jpg)

14. **Faraway**
*25 months on the list*
Explore a mysterious land and fulfill quests on your way back.
![Faraway](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_6a955630.png)

15. **The Gang**
*11 months on the list*
Bet together the order of your hands in Texas Hold'em Poker to win together.
![The Gang](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_3015591e.jpg)

16. **Lost Ruins of Arnak**
*65 months on the list*
Explore an island to find resources and discover the lost ruins of Arnak.
![Lost Ruins of Arnak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_d9efd6db.jpg)

17. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*18 months on the list*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_7f9d70ce.jpg)

18. **Sky Team**
*32 months on the list*
Work together silently to land a plane under increasingly challenging circumstances.
![Sky Team](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_9053d9f9.jpg)

19. **Magical Athlete**
*4 months on the list*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_8e270bda.png)

20. **The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game**
*11 months on the list*
Travel from the Shire and overcome every obstacle as a team.
![The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_d034eaf8.jpg)

21. **The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship**
*5 months on the list*
As members of The Fellowship, embark on a journey to save—or doom—Middle-earth.
![The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_0dc8faf6.png)

22. **Carcassonne**
*275 months on the list*
Shape the medieval French landscape, claiming cities, monasteries, roads, and farms.
![Carcassonne](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_338acb74.jpg)

23. **Moon Colony Bloodbath**
*1 months on the list*
Whatever can go wrong will go wrong. Players compete to keep their colonists alive.
![Moon Colony Bloodbath](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_9bf40374.jpg)

24. **Toy Battle**
*3 months on the list*
Send forth an army of toys to conquer territories.
![Toy Battle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_1a5f2d61.jpg)

25. **SCOUT**
*42 months on the list*
Poach your opponents' artists and outdo each other's circus shows.
![SCOUT](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-14/toplist/bgg_6219aaa4.png)
